What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: White baked cod fillets rest in a white rectangular ceramic baking dish, covered in creamy yellow sauce with lemon zest and green dill. A text overlay identifies the dish in green fonts alongside a pink cupcake logo. A hand uses a blue silicone spatula to stir melting yellow butter cubes inside a silver metal saucepan. The saucepan sits on a black glass-ceramic induction cooktop surface with visible warning text.

canonical_answer: Black pepper is ground over the fish fillets using a grinder.
